classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是减速机端面与侧向局部的尺寸图，包含法兰外形、安装孔、中心圆、轴向外径以及'45°'、'ΦD2'、'ΦC3G6'、'ΦD5G6'、'□L1'、'C4'、'C6'、'C8'等尺寸代号和引出尺寸线；完整标注源图确认其属于'Dimensional Drawing'中的左侧端面视图。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该局部是减速器/零部件的机械尺寸标注，能看到'D6深(depth)L9'、'B1h9'、'H1'等孔深、孔径和外形尺寸引线标注，没有针脚功能或接线定义，属于机械结构尺寸图。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read ocr_001 as 90; visually corrected to D6 and merged with adjacent depth callout.

terminology_notes: D6, B1, H1, and L9 are symbolic dimensional parameters rather than explicit numeric values in this crop.
h9 is treated as an ISO tolerance class attached to B1.

dimension_records.reason: Leader arrow points to the central hole; the visible callout combines hole diameter symbol D6 with depth L9.
Vertical dimension label B1h9 is attached to the slot-like side feature; treated as a keyway/slot width parameter.
Horizontal bottom dimension label H1 is associated with the same small feature; exact engineering meaning is symbolic and table-dependent.

engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Central hole callout D6 with depth L9; side feature has B1h9 and H1 symbolic dimensions.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Actual numeric values for D6, L9, B1, and H1 are not visible in this crop and require the dimensional table.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
